title: About
body:
Aronetiv is a visual artist working with limited color systems, fragmented compositions, and gestural marks.

Each work is constructed using five colors only. Organic color fields collide, overlap, and dissolve into forms that exist between abstraction and recognizable imagery.

Recurring symbols and color codes function as interruptions within the painted space — somewhere between ritual signs, technical markings, and an unknown language.

The works are often presented as fragments of a larger structure, where separate paintings form one shifting visual field.

Alongside painting, aronetiv develops experimental music and type systems as extensions of the same visual language and structural thinking.
